preconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state before opening the Login page
Open the Login page using the Home page person/profile button

testCases.title: Open Login page from Home page guest state using person/profile button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state
Click the person/profile button on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page opens within the SPA flow and the username field, password field, and SIGN IN button are displayed, visible, and interactive without a full browser page reload.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after opening from Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page
Inspect the Login page controls
testCases.expectedResult: The username field accepts keyboard input, the password field accepts masked input, and the SIGN IN button is visible, enabled, and clickable.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked by default during typing
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click inside the password field
Type a sample password into the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Each typed password character is displayed as a masked symbol or hidden value and the readable plain text password is not visible anywhere on the Login page.

testCases.title: Login successfully with valid username and valid password using SIGN IN button
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the username field
Enter a valid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication succeeds, the application returns to the Home page in authenticated state, guest-state controls are no longer shown, and the person/profile button is replaced by authenticated-user identity or logged-in user UI.

testCases.title: Login successfully by submitting credentials using Enter key from password field
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the username field
Enter a valid password into the password field
Press the Enter key while the cursor focus remains inside the password field
testCases.expectedResult: A single login request is submitted from the keyboard action, the user is authenticated successfully, and the application transitions back to authenticated Home page state.

testCases.title: Reject login with invalid username and valid password
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter an invalid username into the username field
Enter a valid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, visible login rejection feedback is displayed, the user remains unauthenticated, and authenticated Home page UI is not displayed.

testCases.title: Reject login with valid username and invalid password
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the username field
Enter an invalid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, visible login error feedback is displayed, the Login page remains active or the Home page remains in guest state, and authenticated-user controls are not shown.

testCases.title: Reject login with invalid username and invalid password
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter an invalid username into the username field
Enter an invalid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, visible error feedback is displayed to the user, the Login page remains displayed, and no authenticated Home state transition occurs.

testCases.title: Display required field validation when SIGN IN is clicked with both fields empty
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Validation feedback for both required fields is displayed, authentication is not attempted, and the Login page remains open without navigation to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Display username required validation when password is entered but username is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the username field empty
Enter a password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible validation message indicating the username is required is displayed and the user remains on the Login page without successful authentication.

testCases.title: Display password required validation when username is entered but password is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a username into the username field
Leave the password field empty
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible validation message indicating the password is required is displayed and the application remains in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Reject login when username field contains only whitespace characters
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter only space characters into the username field
Enter a valid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Whitespace-only username input is treated as invalid or empty, validation or login rejection feedback is displayed, and the application does not authenticate the user.

testCases.title: Reject login when password field contains only whitespace characters
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the username field
Enter only space characters into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Whitespace-only password input is treated as invalid or empty, validation or login rejection feedback is displayed, and authenticated Home state is not reached.

testCases.title: Validate handling of leading and trailing spaces in username and password fields
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username with leading and trailing spaces into the username field
Enter a valid password with leading and trailing spaces into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Leading and trailing spaces are consistently handled according to implemented business behavior, the application remains stable, and the resulting authentication outcome is clearly observable.

testCases.title: Verify pasted credentials can be submitted successfully
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Paste a valid username into the username field
Paste a valid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted values remain in the input fields, the password stays masked after paste action, and successful authentication redirects the user to authenticated Home page state.

testCases.title: Prevent duplicate authentication transition when SIGN IN button is clicked repeatedly
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter valid credentials into the username and password fields
Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication flow is processed, the application transitions to authenticated Home state once, and duplicate login sessions, duplicate redirects, or repeated page transitions are not observed.

testCases.title: Verify Login page is reached through Home page SPA navigation flow
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the application starts on the Home page in guest state
Open the Login page using the person/profile button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page is opened through the Home page navigation flow inside the SPA and the login form appears without exposing a separate standalone login page workflow.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home state after successful login removes guest state indicators
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter valid username and password values
Click the SIGN IN button
Observe the Home page after authentication completes
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in authenticated state, guest-state UI is no longer displayed, authenticated-user UI is visible, and authenticated-only features become accessible.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in username field do not bypass authentication validation
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter unsupported or special characters into the username field
Enter a valid password into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: The application rejects or validates unsupported username input appropriately, visible error feedback is displayed if validation fails, and authenticated state is not granted.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in password field remain masked and do not break login flow
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the username field
Enter a password containing special characters into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: Special characters entered in the password field remain masked, the Login page layout and controls remain stable, and the authentication outcome is processed without application errors.

testCases.title: Verify very long username and password values are handled without UI failure
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter an excessively long value into the username field
Enter an excessively long value into the password field
Click the SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page remains responsive and visually stable, entered values remain contained within the input fields, and oversized invalid credentials do not authenticate the user.

testCases.title: Verify login failure keeps user in unauthenticated state after failed attempt
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invalid credentials
Click the SIGN IN button
Observe the application state after rejection
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains in unauthenticated state, authenticated-user UI is not displayed on the Home page, and the user stays on the Login page or guest Home experience.

testCases.title: Verify keyboard tab navigation moves focus through login controls in logical order
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Press the Tab key repeatedly starting from the username field
testCases.expectedResult: Keyboard focus moves in sequence from the username field to the password field and then to the SIGN IN button without skipping controls or trapping focus.
